name: nexusdoc
description: NexusDoc is an open-source, local-first engine designed to streamline technical documentation for software engineering teams. By processing data entirely on local infrastructure, it ensures zero data leakage, making it a secure solution for handling sensitive codebase context.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../app-desktop && npm install
scripts.dev:local: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
